news.t: Leatherback Long/Short Alternative Yield ETF (LBAY) Marks Two-Year Anniversary as a Top-Performing Long/Short Fund
Leatherback Long/Short Alternative Yield ETF (LBAY) Crosses $50 Million in Assets Under Management
Leatherback Asset Management Launches its First ETF

overview.description: The Leatherback Long/Short Alternative Yield ETF (LBAY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long/short alternatives. The fund is actively managed, seeking to provide monthly income and capital appreciation. The portfolio will generally be 75% - 110% net long LBAY was launched on Nov 16, 2020 and is issued by Tidal.

data.text: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Leatherback Asset Management recently marked the second anniversary of the launch of the Leatherback Long/Short Alternative Yield ETF (LBAY), a fund which ...

data.title: Leatherback Long/Short Alternative Yield ETF (LBAY) Crosses $50 Million in Assets Under Management
data.text: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Actively managed Leatherback Long/Short Alternative Yield ETF (LBAY) has passed $50 million in assets under management, generated strong returns.

data.title: Leatherback Asset Management Launches its First ETF
data.text: Actively managed Leatherback Long/Short Alternative Yield ETF (LBAY) is overseen by portfolio manager and founder Michael Winter, a 20-year veteran of hedge funds, mutual funds
